name: Deed: Dev
description: Weird... you shouldn't have this.

name: Deed: Blank
description: Weird... you shouldn't have this.

description: A hairstyle with bangs and a high ponytail

name: Deed: Hairstyle - Trailer Handband
description: A hairstyle from the trailer

name: Deed: Hairstyle - Full Mohawk
description: A hairstyle with a tall mohawk and shaped stripes on the sides.

name: Deed: Hairstyle - Side Undercut
description: A longer hairstyle swept with one side shaved

name: Deed: Mask - Pointed Ear Mask
description: A mask with pointed ear-like extrusions

name: Deed: Mask - Feline Mask
description: A mask designed in to resemble a cat.

name: Deed: Mask - Stub Horn Mask
description: A mask with two rounded horns on the top of your head

name: Deed: Mask - Four Points Mask
description: A mask with four extruding spikes

name: Deed: Mask - Demon Horn Mask
description: A mask with curling horns

name: Deed: Mask - Uneven Horn Mask
description: A mask with curling horns pieced with gold rings. This mask was lost at sea ages ago.

name: Deed: Mask - Unihorn Mask
description: A mask with with a single spike in the middle of your forehead

name: Deed: Mask - Drooping Ear Mask
description: This mask has droopy ears, almost reminiscent of a Nubi Goat's ears. Maybe it was inspired by them?

name: Deed: Mask - Bug Mask
description: A armored mask giving the appearance of a bug

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arch Blue
description: A mask with a pattern of a simple arch

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arch Yellow Eyes
description: A mask with a pattern of a simple arch

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Runic Blue
description: A mask with a pattern covered in runic lines

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Runic Yellow
description: A mask with a pattern covered in runic lines

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Flower Crown Blue
description: A mask with a pattern of a flower

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Sun Blue
description: A mask with a pattern of a glowing rising sun

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arrows Blue
description: A mask with a pattern of a glowing arrow

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Waves Blue
description: A mask with a pattern of glowing waves

name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Waves Pink
description: A mask with a pattern of glowing waves

name: Deed: Hair Color - Hexite
description: Glowing strands of hexite infused hair

name: Deed: Hair Color - White
description: Snow white hair

name: Deed: Hair Color - Charcoal
description: Dark, almost black hair

name: Deed: Hair Color - Brown
description: Dark brown hair

name: Deed: Cervus (I)
description: A cervus mount that can be ridden for faster traversal. Faster than the goat but not as good at traversing challenging terrain.

name: Deed: Cart
description: A cart that can transport items and cargo.

name: Deed: Wagon
description: A wagon that can transport large amounts of cargo.

name: Deed: Raft
description: A small raft that could transport another player and a small amount of cargo. Purchased from Svim.

name: Deed: Skiff
description: A small boat suitable for navigating rivers and lakes and capable of sailing in the ocean.

name: Deed: Fisher's Boat
description: A large boat that can carry several passengers as well as a large amount of cargo. Purchased from Brico.

name: Deed: Cheater's Boat
description: A boat you shouldn't have

name: Ancient Adventurer's Letter #1
description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

name: Ancient Adventurer's Letter #2
description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

name: Ancient Trapsmith's Journal Page #1
description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

description: A piece of parchment with some writing on it.

name: Ancient Cloth
description: Cloth from the ancient civilization. The twins would be very interested in this.

name: Ancient Research
description: Research from the ancient civilization. A scholar would be very interested in this.

name: Mark of Heimlich
description: A token of Heimlich's appreciation. Heimlich would accept these in exchange for repairing Power Sources for you.

name: Brico Buck
description: A currency of previous high value, burried by Brico. It's value has since decayed to a hundreth of a hex coin.

name: Mark of the Twins
description: A currency earned through selling cloth or ancient goods to the twins. Can be used to buy various cosmetic goods from the Twins.

name: Ancient Journal Page #1
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Ancient Journal Page #2
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Ancient Journal Page #3
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Ancient Journal Page #4
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Ancient Journal Page #5
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Ancient Journal Page #6
description: Read to learn knowledge...

name: Cooling Energy
description: A vessel that contains a faint, blue energy. It's cold to the touch. Could be used to craft a cooling capacitor at a smithing station.

name: Warming Energy
description: A vessel that contains a faint, orange energy. It's warm to the touch. Could be used to craft a heated capacitor at a smithing station.

name: Ripped Notes
description: A fragment of some instructions that seem to detail the creation of a component for a power source to protect from the heat. Maybe a scholar could decipher this?

name: Shredded Notes
description: A fragment of some instructions that seem to detail the creation of a component for a power source to protect from the cold. Maybe a scholar could decipher this?

name: Energy or Notes
description: Notes or energy involved in making capacitors to protect from the cold or heat.

name: Cooling Capacitor
description: A component that could be used to expand the capacity of your Automata's Heart.

name: Heated Capacitor
description: A component that could be used to expand the capacity of your Automata's Heart.

name: Schematic: Cooling Capacitor
description: Instructions for how to create a component for a power source to protect from the heat.

name: Schematic: Heated Capacitor
description: Instructions for how to create a component for a power source to protect from the cold.

name: Schematic: Heimlich's House
description: Instructions for how to set up a house to Heimlich's liking. Heimlich will take up residence in the house where you can buy and trade with him more conveniently.

name: Ancient Key Mold
description: A mold to make a key. For use in this ruin.

name: Ancient Enadarite
description: An ancient piece of Enadarite. This ingot seems to be infused with some kind of energy. It might be attuned to something in this ruin?

name: Ancient Enadarite Key
description: A key forged from a mold to open a door in this ruin.

name: Miracle Drink
description: A magic drink you shouldn't have.

name: Boots of Haste
description: Magical boots you shouldn't have.

name: Teleport Crystal
description: Lets you teleport at someone's location

name: Stick
description: A regular stick harvested from bushes or stickpiles. Could be used for crafting or building.

name: Knapped Flint
description: A small shard of flint rock. Brittle, but sharp.

name: Wild Grain
description: Dry seed that could be used to make food.

name: Wild Vegetable
description: A wild onion that could be used to make food.

name: Empty Bucket
description: An empty wood bucket, could be filled with water from a well.

name: Water Bucket
description: A bucket full of fresh water.

name: Pitch
description: A sticky material made by processing tree sap in a kiln. Could be used as sealant

name: Bone Glue
description: Glue made from animal bones and fat. Could be used in construction and crafting.

name: Animal Fat
description: A lump of fat from an animal. Could be used for cooking or fuel in a pinch.

name: Tree Sap
description: A small amount of sticky tree resin.

name: Flint Axe
description: An axe made from flint.

name: Flint Saw
description: A saw made from flint.

name: Flint Chisel
description: A chisel made from flint.

name: Flint Pickaxe
description: A pickaxe made from flint.

name: Flint Hammer
description: A hammer made from flint.

description: A knife made from flint.

name: Flint Bow
description: A bow made from flint.

name: Flint Rod

name: Cooking Pot
description: A pot for cooking

name: Flint Machete
description: A machete made from flint.

name: Flint Quill
description: A quill made from flint.

name: Flint Tool Bundle
description: A bundle that contains all the tools you'll need to get started.

name: Argent Ore
description: A piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed at a miners station.

name: Auric Ore
description: A piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed at a masonry's station.

name: Crushed Piece of Argent Ore
description: A crushed piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed into concentrate at a grinder.

name: Crushed Piece of Auric Ore
description: A crushed piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed into concentrate at a grinder.

name: Argent Ore Concentrate
description: A small amount concentrate made from precious metal. Could be processed into a nugget.

name: Auric Ore Concentrate
description: A small amount concentrate made from precious metal. Could be processed into a nugget.

name: Argent Nugget

name: Auric Nugget
description: A small amount of precious metal made by smelting concentrate. Could be made into an ingot at a smithing station.

name: Argent Ingot
description: An ingot of precious metal. Could be used to make some more advanced crafting recipes.

name: Auric Ingot
description: An ingot of precious metal. Could be used to make some more advanced crafting recipes.

name: Master Tool
description: A tool to rule them all

name: Art Of Cheating Scroll
description: Read this to learn all about cheating

name: Botter's Tool
description: A tool for botters.

description: A treatment made by Scholars to purify leather further.

name: Buccaneer's Greenthread Charm (II)
description: A charm woven from some strange kind of plant.

name: Rough Wood Log
description: A cross section of a tree trunk harvested from trees or fallen trunks. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: Rough Tree Bark
description: A piece of tree bark. Could be used to make tannin at a leatherworking station.

name: Rough Charcoal
description: A piece of charcoal made from burning logs in a kiln, would make good fuel.

name: Ash
description: Residue from the charcoal used to burn this. Could be safely thrown away.

name: Birch Seed
description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

name: Beech Seed
description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

name: Oak Seed
description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

name: Potted Birch Sapling
description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

name: Potted Beech Sapling
description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

name: Potted Oak Sapling
description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

name: Rough Untreated Plank
description: A planed piece of untreated wood made at a carptenry station. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: Rough Tool Handle
description: A wood handle with hide straps as a grip made at a carptenry station. Used for crafting tools.

name: Rough Plank
description: A plank of wood sawed from stripped wood.

name: High Quality Rough Plank
description: A plank of wood treated using oil at a carptenry station. Could be used to make more advanced structures.

name: Rough Pebbles
description: A handful of tiny pebbles of rock made at a masonry station. Can be used to by mason's to make various crafting materials or grinded down to search for gem fragments.

name: Rough Brick

name: Crushed Ferralith Ore
description: A pile of crushed ore. Could be processed into concentrate at a by a smith.

name: Basic Mortar

description: A skilled mason could cut this.

description: A precious gem that could be used for rare crafts.

description: A precious gem that could be used for rare crafts.

name: Massive Rough Sapphire

description: This could be used to forge gems.

name: Rough Forester's Pot
description: Could be used to plant a sapling to grow a tree.

name: Rough Unfired Forester's Pot
description: Could be used to plant a sapling to grow a tree.

name: Rough Rock
description: A piece of rock. Could be used for crafting or building.

name: Ferralith Ore Piece
description: A piece of rock with exposed bits of ore. Could be processed at a Smithing Station.

name: Ferralith Ore Concentrate
description: Ore that's been processed into a fine concentrate. Could be smelted into metal in a smelter.

name: Ferralith Ingot
description: A rectangular ingot of metal forged at a smithing station.

name: Ferralith Nails
description: A nail forged at a smithing station. Often used for construction.

name: Molten Ferralith
description: A bar of molten metal made by smelting concentrate.

name: High Quality Ferralith Ingot
description: A rectangular ingot of metal forged at a smithing station.

name: Rough Cleaned Pelt
description: A hide that has been cleaned and prepared for use. Can be used to make leather in a tanning tub.

name: Rough Leather
description: A large piece of leather. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: Rough Leather Straps
description: A thin strip of cut leather. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: High Quality Rough Leather
description: A large piece of high quality leather. Could be used for crafting or building.

name: Silken Hexmoth
description: Insects that could be used to make bait more efficiently for fishermen.

name: Hexmoth Cocoon
description: Could be unraveled at a loom to make silk cloth.

name: Rough Raw Pelt
description: A fresh pelt from a wild animal. Could be cleaned at a leatherworking station for use.

name: Basic Raw Meat
description: A piece of meat from a wild animal. Could be used as a cooking ingredient.

name: Animal Bones
description: A few small pieces of bone. Could be processed into glue in a kiln.

name: Rough Dried Pelt
description: A hide that has been dried and preserved. Could be used to make leather.

name: Basic Tannin
description: A material made from processing water and bark in a tanning tub. Used to tan leather.

name: Rough Fabric
description: A piece of fabric made from fibers. Could be used to make clothing.

name: Rough Cloth
description: A thick weave of cloth made by a tailor.

name: Rough Twine
description: A strand of thin cordage made from plant fiber at a tailoring station.

name: Rough Rope
description: A thick rope made out of multiple strands of cordage. Could be used for crafting or building.

name: High Quality Rough Cloth
description: A thick weave of cloth made by a tailor.

name: Rough Spool Of Thread
description: A spool of thread made from fibers. Can be used to make cloth strips and some buildings.

name: Hexmoth Silk Cloth
description: Smooth, silk cloth processed at a loom from the cocoon of a Hexmoth. Various travelers would be interested in this.

name: Basic Fertilizer
description: A basic fertilizer made at a farming station. Used for fertilizing crops.

name: Wild Grain Seeds
description: A wild grain seed. Can be grown into a better crop by farmers.

name: Wild Vegetable Seeds
description: Can be turned into white onion seeds by a farmer.

name: Basic Embergrain Seeds
description: Can be grown into an Embergrain plant in a farming field.

name: Basic Embergrain Plant
description: Can be split into Embergrain to cook or Embergrain Seeds to replant.

name: Basic Embergrain
description: Embergrains which could be cooked into dough.

name: Basic Starbulb Seeds
description: Can be grown into a Starlight Onion Plant in a farming field.

name: Basic Starbulb Plant
description: Can be husked into Starlight Onions to eat or Starlight Onion Seeds to replant.

name: Basic Starbulb
description: A Starlight Onion. Maybe a cook could make something good out of this?

name: Wild Fiberplant Seeds
description: Can be grown into a domesticated plant which produces filaments.

name: Basic Wispweave Seeds
description: Can be grown into a Wispweave Plant in a farming field. Produces filaments used for making cloth.

name: Basic Wispweave Plant
description: Can be split into Wispweave Filament for tailoring and Wispweave Seeds to replant.

name: Rough Wispweave Filament
description: A finer cloth filament that could be used to make cloth. Grown by farmers.

name: Basic Tropical Rice Seeds
description: Can be grown into a Rice Seedling in a farming field.

name: Basic Tropical Rice Seedling
description: Can be planted in shallow waters in tropical regions. Use the context menu on this item to plant.

name: Tropical Rice
description: A sweet rice found in tropical regions, which can be used to create a wide variety of dishes.

name: Basic Bait
description: Bait made at a fishing station. Could be used to catch larger fish.

name: Basic Fish Oil
description: Oil made from fish. Can be used for making leather treatment and ink.

name: Rough Shell
description: Sea shells that can be used for certain crafting recipes or ground up and used by masons.

name: Crushed Rough Shells
description: Ground sea shells. Can be used by a mason to make more refined bricks.

name: Salt
description: Sea salt. Could be used to cook something tasty.

name: Briny Guppi
description: A fish found in shallow lakes and rivers. Can be used to cook food or as bait and a source of shells.

name: Briny Argus
description: A fish found in the deeper parts of lakes and some rivers. Can provide fish oil, food and also be used as chum for ocean fishing.

name: Briny Argus Filet
description: A filet from a fish from the deeper parts of a lake. Could be used for food or to make fertilizer for farming.

name: Briny Linus Filet
description: A filet from a fish from the ocean. Could be used to make food.

name: Briny Argus Products
description: Filets of fish from a Lake Fish. Can also provide Fish Oil.

name: Briny Linus Products
description: Filets of fish from an Ocean Fish. Can also provide Fish Oil or Scales.

name: Briny Linus Scale
description: A fish scale crystalized by the salt in the ocean. Svim would be interested in this.

name: Basic Chum
description: Can be used to chum fishing nodes in the ocean. Once chummed, nodes remain fishable for 15 minutes.

name: Basic Embergrain Flour
description: A pile of Embergrain Flour. Could be used to bake something.

name: Basic Embergrain Dough
description: A dough ball made of Embergrain Flour.

name: Basic Crop Oil
description: Oil made from mashing starbulbs. Could be used to make wood treatment at a scholar station.

name: Rough Plant Fiber
description: A strong piece of plant fiber. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: Basic Mushroom
description: A plump mushroom that looks edible and quite hearty. Probably better cooked.

name: Basic Clay Lump
description: A lump of clay. Could be used to build or craft something, or even pave the ground.

name: Basic Berry
description: A juicy edible berry. Probably better cooked.

name: Basic Flower
description: A flower that could be grinded up to make pigment or used to make tea.

name: Mallet
description: A basic tool that could be used for constructing buildings or terraforming land.

name: Coconut Hat
description: The one, the only coconut hat. All that for this, huh?

name: Plain Cooked Berries
description: Berries that have been cooked into a mushy mess. Tasty enough though.

name: Plain Mushroom Skewer
description: Mushrooms roasted on a fire skewered on a stick.

name: Plain Roasted Meat
description: Meat cooked on an open fire.

name: Plain Mashed Bulbs
description: Mashed starbulbs. Tasty and filling but not overly interesting.

name: Plain Skewered Baitfish
description: Small fish skewered on a stick and cooked on a fire.

name: Plain Roasted Fish
description: Filets from a fresh water fish roasted on a fire.

name: Plain Roasted Ocean Fish
description: Filets from an ocean fish roasted on a fire.

name: Plain Bread
description: Bread made from flour. Tasty by itself but it could be used to make sandwiches.

name: Plain Fish and Bulbs
description: Fish arranged in a dish with salty fried potatoes. Delicious and filling.

name: Plain Ground Meat and Mashed Bulbs
description: Ground meat served with a side of potatoes with onions. Delicious and filling.

name: Plain Meat Sandwich
description: A piece of meat and some onions stuck between two delicious pieces of bread.

name: Plain Raw Berry Pie
description: An unbaked pie. Bake it in an oven to eat it!

name: Plain Berry Pie
description: Smells delicious. You can hardly wait to eat it.

name: Plain Mushroom Stuffed Bulbs
description: Onions stuffed with wild mushrooms.

name: Plain Raw Bulb Rolls
description: Uncooked onion rolls. Cook them in an oven to eat them!

name: Plain Bulb Rolls
description: Warm, tasty onion rolls.

name: Plain Hot Tea
description: A tea that warms your body. Could keep you warm in even the harshest of cold environments.

name: Plain Chilling Tea
description: A tea that cools your body. Could keep you cool in even the harshest of hot environments.

name: Ancient Research
description: Ancient research. A scholar would be very interested in this.

name: Hunter's Bow Recipe
description: A schematic for how to make a more advanced bow.

name: Blacksmith's Key Recipe
description: A schematic for how to make a key to open doors in ancient ruins.

name: Stone Brazier Blueprint
description: A schematic for how to make a stone brazier.

name: Blacksmith's Key
description: A key forged by a blacksmith.

name: Intricate Key
description: A complex key made from other ancient keys.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Gear
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Wires
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Spring
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Mechanism
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Resistor
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Rough Repaired Ancient Connector
description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.

name: Dried Basic Flowers
description: Could be used to make pigment or some foods.

name: Basic Ink
description: Ink made of pigment and fish oil. Could be used by a scholar to transcribe stone carvings found in hieroglyphs around the world and in ruins.

name: Rough Parchment
description: A scholar could use this with ink to create study journals.

name: Basic Pigment
description: Pigment made from flowers. Could be used for ink or certain clothing.

name: Beginner's Study Journal
description: Created at a scholar station from stone carvings, ink and parchment.

name: Rough Blank Journal
description: Made from parchment at a scholar station. Can be filled at ancient structures in ruins.

name: Beginner's Building Blueprint
description: Used to build more advanced buildings.

name: Beginner's Stone Carvings
description: Writing and images carved in a stone from the ancient civilization. A scholar might be able to decipher some valuable information from this at a Research Desk.

name: Beginner's Stone Diagrams
description: Detailed writing and images carved in a stone from the ancient civilization. A scholar might be able to decipher some valuable information from this at a Research Desk.

name: Rough Ruby
description: A cut gem that could be used in various jewelry.

name: Rough Emerald
description: A cut gem that could be used in various jewelry.

name: Rough Diamond
description: A cut gem that could be used in various jewelry.

name: Rough Sapphire
description: A cut gem that could be used in various jewelry.

name: Rough Untreated Plank Output
description: Crafts between 2 and 5 Untreated Planks.

name: Rough Plank Output
description: Planks treated using oil. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Rough Pebbles Output
description: Crafts between 2 and 5 Pebbles

name: Ferralith Ingot Output
description: A metal ingot used for crafting tools and other products. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Rough Gem
description: A random gem.

name: Rough Cloth Output
description: A thick weave of cloth. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Rough Leather Output
description: A large piece of leather. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Rough Medium Leather Output
description: A large piece of leather. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Rough Large Leather Output
description: A large piece of leather. This craft has multiple possible outcomes.

name: Beginner's Hieroglyphs
description: Writing and images carved in a stone from the ancient civilization. A scholar might be able to decipher some valuable information from this at a Research Desk.

name: Beginner's Stone Diagram Research
description: Deciphered notes from some intricate diagrams. Could yield schematics for powerful modules or scholar's journals.

name: Basic Bait and Shells
description: Materials from a fish processed at a fishing station. Contains some amount of bait and shells.

name: Basic Embergrain Products
description: Food products and seeds husked from a plant.

name: Basic Starbulb Products
description: Food products and seeds husked from a plant.

name: Basic Wispweave Products
description: Filaments and other cloth products husked from a wispweave plant.

name: Basic Tropical Rice Products
description: Food products and seeds husked from a rice plant.

name: Simple Wood Log
description: A cross section of a tree trunk harvested from trees or fallen trunks. Could be used to build or craft something.

name: Simple Tree Bark
description: A piece of tree bark. Could be used to make tannin at a leatherworking station.
